'''âw-v-p''' ('''kawavap''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:headlock|headlock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-v-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:headlock|headlock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-v-p
|-
! Lemma
| kawavap
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwavap|thiwavap]] || [[word:jiwavap|jiwavap]] || [[word:shiwavap|shiwavap]] || [[word:kiwavap|kiwavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwavap|thuthuwavap]] || [[word:jujuwavap|jujuwavap]] || [[word:shushuwavap|shushuwavap]] || [[word:kukuwavap|kukuwavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwavap|thuwavap]] || [[word:juwavap|juwavap]] || [[word:shuwavap|shuwavap]] || [[word:kuwavap|kuwavap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwavap|thuwavap]] || [[word:juwavap|juwavap]] || [[word:shuwavap|shuwavap]] || [[word:kuwavap|kuwavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewavap|thewavap]] || [[word:jewavap|jewavap]] || [[word:shewavap|shewavap]] || [[word:kewavap|kewavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowavap|thothowavap]] || [[word:jojowavap|jojowavap]] || [[word:shoshowavap|shoshowavap]] || [[word:kokowavap|kokowavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowavap|thowavap]] || [[word:jowavap|jowavap]] || [[word:showavap|showavap]] || [[word:kowavap|kowavap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowavap|thowavap]] || [[word:jowavap|jowavap]] || [[word:showavap|showavap]] || [[word:kowavap|kowavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwavap|thĂŠwavap]] || [[word:jĂŠwavap|jĂŠwavap]] || [[word:shĂŠwavap|shĂŠwavap]] || [[word:kĂŠwavap|kĂŠwavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawavap|thathawavap]] || [[word:jajawavap|jajawavap]] || [[word:shashawavap|shashawavap]] || [[word:kakawavap|kakawavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawavap|thawavap]] || [[word:jawavap|jawavap]] || [[word:shawavap|shawavap]] || [[word:kawavap|kawavap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawavap|thawavap]] || [[word:jawavap|jawavap]] || [[word:shawavap|shawavap]] || [[word:kawavap|kawavap]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawavap|shawavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawavap|goshawavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawavap|gokishawavap]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawavapnĂŒ|shawavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawavapnknĂŒ|goshawavapnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavapnĂŒ|gokishawavapnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawavapshĂ«|shawavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawavapnkshĂ«|goshawavapnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawavapshĂ«|gokishawavapshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavapro|shawavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavapnkro|goshawavapnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavapro|gokishawavapro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavapmu|shawavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavapnkmu|goshawavapnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavapmu|gokishawavapmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawavapsher|shawavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawavapnksher|goshawavapnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawavapsher|gokishawavapsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawavapng|shawavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawavapnkng|goshawavapnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawavapng|gokishawavapng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawavapya|shawavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawavapnkya|goshawavapnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawavapya|gokishawavapya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawavapyam|shawavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawavapnkyam|goshawavapnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawavapyam|gokishawavapyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavapnĂŒshĂ«|shawavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavapnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawavapnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavapnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawavapnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavapnĂŒro|shawavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavapnknĂŒro|goshawavapnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavapnĂŒro|gokishawavapnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavapnĂŒmu|shawavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavapnknĂŒmu|goshawavapnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavapnĂŒmu|gokishawavapnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavapshĂ«nĂŒ|shawavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawavapnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavapshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawavapshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavapshĂ«ro|shawavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavapnkshĂ«ro|goshawavapnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavapshĂ«ro|gokishawavapshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavapshĂ«mu|shawavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavapnkshĂ«mu|goshawavapnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavapshĂ«mu|gokishawavapshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavapronĂŒ|shawavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavapnkronĂŒ|goshawavapnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavapronĂŒ|gokishawavapronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavaproshĂ«|shawavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavapnkroshĂ«|goshawavapnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavaproshĂ«|gokishawavaproshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawavapromu|shawavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawavapnkromu|goshawavapnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawavapromu|gokishawavapromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawavapmunĂŒ|shawavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawavapnkmunĂŒ|goshawavapnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawavapmunĂŒ|gokishawavapmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawavapmushĂ«|shawavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawavapnkmushĂ«|goshawavapnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawavapmushĂ«|gokishawavapmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawavapmuro|shawavapmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawavapnkmuro|goshawavapnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawavapmuro|gokishawavapmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
